ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "comp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "comp_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "comp_date" TEXT /* Date the competition is held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "comp_type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., regatta, championship) */,
  "regatta_format" TEXT /* Format of the regatta (e.g., fleet racing, match racing) */,
  "notice_of_race" TEXT /* Notice of race document */,
  "sailing_instructions" TEXT /* Sailing instructions document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the competition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the competition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "sail_number" TEXT /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "boat_type" TEXT /* Type of boat (e.g., Express 27, C&C 33 Mk II) */,
  "fleet" TEXT /* Fleet the boat belongs to (e.g., B, A) */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the boat */,
  "beam" TEXT /* Beam of the boat */,
  "draft" TEXT /* Draft of the boat */,
  "displacement" TEXT /* Displacement of the boat */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the boat was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the boat was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the owner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the owner */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the owner */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the owner was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the owner was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boat_owners" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "ownership_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of ownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id", "owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the competitor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the competitor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the competitor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the competitor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the competitor */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the competitor */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the competitor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the competitor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the competitor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "comp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the race belongs to */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the race */,
  "wind_speed" TEXT /* Wind speed during the race */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the race */,
  "course_length" TEXT /* Length of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the race was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the race was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_comp_id FOREIGN KEY ("comp_id") REFERENCES competitions ("comp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the result belongs to */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "finish_position" INTEGER /* Finish position of the boat */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time of the boat */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time of the boat */,
  "penalty_time" TEXT /* Penalty time imposed on the boat */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scoring_systems" (
  "scoring_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scoring system */,
  "comp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the scoring system belongs to */,
  "scoring_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the scoring system */,
  "scoring_system_description" TEXT /* Description of the scoring system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the scoring system was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the scoring system was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scoring_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the penalty belongs to */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "penalty_time" TEXT /* Penalty time imposed on the boat */,
  "penalty_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the penalty */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the penalty was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the penalty was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "comp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the fee belongs to */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "fee_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., entry fee, mooring fee) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the fee was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the fee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_comp_id FOREIGN KEY ("comp_id") REFERENCES competitions ("comp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "comp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the registration belongs to */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the registration was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the registration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_competitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_id") REFERENCES competitors ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_comp_id FOREIGN KEY ("comp_id") REFERENCES competitions ("comp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
